summary: There is no available evidence linking bezafibrate to colonization cancer prevention in patients with coronary artery disease; existing research focuses solely on lipid modification rather than anti-carcinogenic properties. Consequently, bezafibrate cannot be considered effective for colonic cancer prophylaxis based on current data.
